heading: (Optional) Map an Organization
body:
Use the **Federation Management Console** to assign your
domain's users access to specific Atlas organizations:

- Click Link Organizations.

  Atlas displays all organizations where you are an
  [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>).

  Organizations which are not already connected to the Federation
  Application have Configure Access button in the
  Actions column.

- Click the desired organization's Configure Access button.

* On the Identity Provider screen, click
  Connect Identity Provider.

  Atlas directs you to the Identity Providers screen
  which shows all IdPs (Identity Providers) you have linked to Atlas.

* For the IdP (Identity Provider) you want to apply to the organization, click
  Connect.

* In the Apply Identity Provider to Organizations modal,
  select the organizations to which this IdP (Identity Provider) applies.

* Click Confirm.

- Click Linked Organizations in the left navigation.

- In the list of Organizations, ensure that your desired
  organizations now have the expected
  Identity Provider.
